Name: Age_of_First_Bin_Edge_Female
Description: The maximum age for the first age bin when dividing the female population into age bins for pair formation.

Name: Age_of_First_Bin_Edge_Male
Description: The maximum age for the first age bin when dividing the male population into age bins for pair formation.

Name: Assortivity
Description: The object that defines how people will preferentially form pairs based on their membership in different groups.

Name: Extra_Relational_Rate_Ratio_Female
Description: For women, the rate ratio for having extra-relational sex for this relationship type, where the ratio is the event over the period of time defined in **Update_Period**.

Name: Extra_Relational_Rate_Ratio_Male
Description: For males, the rate ratio for having extra-relational sex for this relationship type, where the ratio is the event over the period of time defined in **Update_Period**.

Name: Formation_Rate_Constant
Description: If **Formation_Rate_Type** is set to CONSTANT, the number of new relationships per day for this relationship type.

Name: Formation_Rate_Interpolated_Values
Description: The structure that contains two arrays of floats specifying **Times** and **Values** arrays that will be interpolated to provide the formation rate when **Formation_Rate_Type** is set to INTERPOLATED_VALUES. The years listed in **Times** must be in ascending order; the first year must be prior to the current year and if the last year is prior to the current year, the last value in **Values** will be used for the formation rate.

Name: Formation_Rate_Sigmoid
Description:
The structure that determines the shape of the sigmoidal curve for pair formation when **Formation_Rate_Type** is set to SIGMOID_VARIABLE_WIDTH_HEIGHT. Include the following parameters:

Min
The minimum asymptote (0 to 1, default 1).
Max
The maximum asymptote (0 to 1, default 1).
Mid
The year of the inflection point (0 to 100000, default 2000).
Rate
The rate (proportional to the slope by a factor of 4) at the inflection point (-100 to 100, default 1).

Name: Formation_Rate_Type
Description:
The type of functional form that describes that pair formation rate. Possible values are:

CONSTANT
The rate is a constant value.
SIGMOID_VARIABLE_WIDTH_HEIGHT
The rate is a sigmoidal curve.
INTERPOLATED_VALUES
The rate is interpolated between a set of supplied values.

Name: Joint_Probabilities
Description: The relative preference of members of one age bin to form relationships with members of another age bin. The columns represent female bins and rows represent male bins.

Name: Number_Age_Bins_Female
Description: The number of age bins to divide the female population into for pair formation.

Name: Number_Age_Bins_Male
Description: The number of age bins to divide the male population into for pair formation.

Name: Update_Period
Description: The period, in days, to wait before an individual is eligible to seek out new relationships.

Name: Years_Between_Bin_Edges_Female
Description: For the female population, the number of years covered in each age bin.

Name: Years_Between_Bin_Edges_Male
Description: For the male population, the number of years covered in each age bin.
